title: ilex ningdeensis
intro: Ilex ningdeensis is a species of evergreen tree within the holly family (Aquifoliaceae), native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ilex ningdeensis include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the treatment of various infections. The herbal preparations of Ilex ningdeensis typically involve drying and processing the leaves or bark, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
